## Feature verification (if applicable)

If this PR includes content referencing a specific GitHub Copilot feature:

- [ ] Verified against [official documentation](https://docs.github.com/en/copilot) on `YYYY-MM-DD`
- [ ] `Verified: YYYY-MM` field updated in the affected module or file header
- [ ] Plan-specific restrictions noted where relevant (Pro / Pro+ / Business / Enterprise)

---

## Checklist

- [ ] Followed the relevant template (`module`, `lab`, `prompt`, or `agent`)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal data included — even in examples
- [ ] All internal links checked and resolving
- [ ] Markdown formatting passes (ATX headings, fenced code blocks with language, blank lines around blocks)
- [ ] Cross-references updated (SYLLABUS, LEARNING_PATH, module navigation) if new content was added
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated with a brief entry under `[Unreleased]`
